title: olearia excorticata
intro: Olearia excorticata, also known as the prickly tree daisy or bush daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. Olearia excorticata has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, treating wounds, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
